title: justicia keriana
intro: Justicia keriana, also known as the Wild Azulene, is a plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in azulene, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Justicia keriana include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with arthritis, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Justicia keriana typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or tinctures, or used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
